opsAnalyticsQuery.sql:
SELECT
  t.Status,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%y/%m/%d', t.MaintenanceStartTime, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS MaintenanceStartTime_YYMMDD
FROM
  `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
WHERE
  (
    IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
    AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
  )
ORDER BY
  t.MaintenanceStartTime DESC
LIMIT 10000

SELECT
  t.Status,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%y/%m/%d', t.MaintenanceEndTime, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS MaintenanceEndTime_YYMMDD
FROM
  `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
WHERE
  (
    IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
    AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
  )
ORDER BY
  t.MaintenanceEndTime DESC
LIMIT 10000

WITH Prep AS (
  SELECT
    t.Cluster,
    t.Nodepool,
    t.Node,
    t.Is_CTM,
    t.Status,
    t.Type,
    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(t.MaintenanceStartTime, HOUR, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS MaintenanceHour
  FROM
    `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
  WHERE
    t.Nodepool IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
    )
),
AggregatedPools AS (
  SELECT
    Cluster,
    Nodepool,
    MaintenanceHour,
    COUNT(Node) AS Total_Nodes,
    COUNTIF(Status = 'COMPLETE') AS Count_COMPLETE,
    COUNTIF(Status = 'ONGOING') AS Count_ONGOING,
    COUNTIF(Status = 'PENDING') AS Count_PENDING,
    COUNTIF(Is_CTM) AS CTM_count,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT Type) > 1 THEN 'MIXED' ELSE MAX(Type) END AS Combined_Type
  FROM Prep
  GROUP BY Cluster, Nodepool, MaintenanceHour
)
SELECT
  Cluster AS Cluster_name,
  Nodepool AS Nodepool_name,
  Combined_Type AS Type,
  Total_Nodes,
  ROUND((Count_COMPLETE * 100.0) / Total_Nodes, 2) AS Status_percent_COMPLETE,
  CASE 
    WHEN (Count_COMPLETE * 1.0 / Total_Nodes) >= 0.95 THEN 'COMPLETE'
    WHEN ((Count_COMPLETE + Count_ONGOING) * 1.0 / Total_Nodes) >= 0.95 THEN 'ONGOING'
    ELSE 'PENDING'
  END AS Effective_Pool_Status,
  CTM_count,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y, %b, %d %H:00 %Z', MaintenanceHour, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS Maintenance_start_time
FROM
  AggregatedPools
ORDER BY
  MaintenanceHour DESC,
  Status_percent_COMPLETE ASC

WITH Prep AS (
  SELECT
    t.Cluster,
    t.Nodepool,
    t.Node,
    t.Is_CTM,
    t.Status,
    t.Type,
    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(t.MaintenanceEndTime, HOUR, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS MaintenanceEndHour,
    t.MaintenanceEndTime
  FROM
    `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
  WHERE
    t.Nodepool IS NOT NULL
    AND (
      IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
    )
),
AggregatedPools AS (
  SELECT
    Cluster,
    Nodepool,
    MaintenanceEndHour,
    MAX(MaintenanceEndTime) AS Max_End_Time,
    COUNT(Node) AS Total_Nodes,
    COUNTIF(Status = 'COMPLETE') AS Count_COMPLETE,
    COUNTIF(Status = 'ONGOING') AS Count_ONGOING,
    COUNTIF(Status = 'PENDING') AS Count_PENDING,
    COUNTIF(Is_CTM) AS CTM_count,
    CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT Type) > 1 THEN 'MIXED' ELSE MAX(Type) END AS Combined_Type
  FROM Prep
  GROUP BY Cluster, Nodepool, MaintenanceEndHour
)
SELECT
  Cluster AS Cluster_name,
  Nodepool AS Nodepool_name,
  Combined_Type AS Type,
  Total_Nodes,
  ROUND((Count_COMPLETE * 100.0) / Total_Nodes, 2) AS Status_percent_COMPLETE,
  CASE 
    WHEN (Count_COMPLETE * 1.0 / Total_Nodes) >= 0.95 THEN 'COMPLETE'
    WHEN ((Count_COMPLETE + Count_ONGOING) * 1.0 / Total_Nodes) >= 0.95 THEN 'ONGOING'
    ELSE 'PENDING'
  END AS Effective_Pool_Status,
  CTM_count,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%y/%m/%d', Max_End_Time, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS MaintenanceEndTime_YYMMDD,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y, %b, %d %H:00 %Z', MaintenanceEndHour, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS Maintenance_end_hour_bucket
FROM
  AggregatedPools
ORDER BY
  Max_End_Time DESC,
  Status_percent_COMPLETE ASC
LIMIT 10000

SELECT
  t.Status
FROM
  `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
WHERE
  (
    IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
    AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
  )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.Node ORDER BY t.CycleCount DESC) = 1
ORDER BY
  t.MaintenanceEndTime DESC
LIMIT 10000

SELECT
  TIMESTAMP_DIFF(t.MaintenanceEndTime, t.MaintenanceStartTime, SECOND) / 3600 AS maintenance_duration_hours,
  t.MaintenanceEndTime
FROM
  `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
WHERE
  (
    IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
    AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
  )
  AND t.Status = 'COMPLETE'
  AND EXISTS(
    SELECT 1 
    FROM UNNEST(t.Events) AS e 
    WHERE e.Reason IN ('MaintenanceWindowStarted', 'TerminateOnHostMaintenance')
  )
ORDER BY 
  t.MaintenanceEndTime DESC

SELECT
  t.Type
FROM
  `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
WHERE
  (
    IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
    AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
  )
LIMIT 10000

SELECT
  CAST(t.TimeSinceLastMaintenance AS FLOAT64) / 86400 AS DaysSinceLastMaintenance,
  t.MaintenanceEndTime
FROM
  `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
WHERE
  (
    IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
    AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
  )
  AND t.TimeSinceLastMaintenance IS NOT NULL

WITH Prep AS (
  SELECT
    t.Cluster,
    t.Nodepool,
    t.Node,
    t.Is_CTM,
    t.Status,
    t.Type,
    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(t.MaintenanceStartTime, DAY, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS MaintenanceDay
  FROM
    `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
  WHERE
    (
      (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0 OR t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0 OR t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0 OR t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0 OR t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0 OR t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
    )
)
SELECT
  Cluster AS Cluster_name,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT Type) > 1 THEN 'MIXED'
    ELSE MAX(Type)
  END AS Type,
  ROUND((COUNTIF(Status = 'COMPLETE') * 100.0) / COUNT(Node), 2) AS Status_percent_COMPLETE,
  COUNT(DISTINCT Nodepool) AS Nodepool_count,
  COUNT(Node) AS Node_count,
  COUNTIF(Is_CTM) AS CTM_count,
  COUNTIF(Status = 'COMPLETE') AS COMPLETE_count,
  COUNTIF(Status = 'PENDING') AS PENDING_count,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d', MaintenanceDay, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS Maintenance_date
FROM
  Prep
GROUP BY
  Cluster,
  MaintenanceDay
ORDER BY
  MaintenanceDay DESC,
  Status_percent_COMPLETE ASC

WITH Prep AS (
  SELECT
    t.Cluster,
    t.Nodepool,
    t.Node,
    t.Is_CTM,
    t.Status,
    t.Type,
    TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(t.MaintenanceStartTime, HOUR, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS MaintenanceHour
  FROM
    `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
  WHERE
    (
      IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
      AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
      AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
    )
)
SELECT
  Cluster AS Cluster_name,
  Nodepool AS Nodepool_name,
  CASE 
    WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT Type) > 1 THEN 'MIXED'
    ELSE MAX(Type)
  END AS Type,
  ROUND((COUNTIF(Status = 'COMPLETE') * 100.0) / COUNT(Node), 2) AS Status_percent_COMPLETE,
  COUNT(Node) AS Node_count,
  COUNTIF(Is_CTM) AS CTM_count,
  COUNTIF(Status = 'COMPLETE') AS COMPLETE_count,
  COUNTIF(Status = 'PENDING') AS PENDING_count,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:00 %Z', MaintenanceHour, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS Maintenance_start_hour
FROM
  Prep
GROUP BY
  Cluster,
  Nodepool,
  MaintenanceHour
ORDER BY
  MaintenanceHour DESC,
  Status_percent_COMPLETE ASC

SELECT
  t.Status,
  t.Type,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z', t.MaintenanceStartTime, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS Maintenance_scheduled_time,
  FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z', t.MaintenanceEndTime, 'America/Los_Angeles') AS Maintenance_end_time,
  t.Node AS Node_name,
  t.Nodepool AS Nodepool_name,
  t.Cluster AS Cluster_name,
  t.Is_CTM AS Is_customer_triggered,
  CASE 
    WHEN t.TimeSinceLastMaintenance IS NOT NULL THEN
      FORMAT('%d days, %d hours, %d mins',
        DIV(CAST(t.TimeSinceLastMaintenance AS INT64), 86400),
        DIV(MOD(CAST(t.TimeSinceLastMaintenance AS INT64), 86400), 3600),
        DIV(MOD(CAST(t.TimeSinceLastMaintenance AS INT64), 3600), 60)
      )
    ELSE 'N/A'
  END AS Time_since_last_maintenance_cycle,
  ARRAY(
    SELECT FORMAT('%s: %s', FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M %Z', e.EventTime, 'America/Los_Angeles'), e.Reason)
    FROM UNNEST(t.Events) AS e
  ) AS Events
FROM
  `analytics_view.@__project_id.global.Inferred_MaintenanceEvents_Aggregated` AS t
WHERE
  (
    IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Cluster) = 0, TRUE, t.Cluster IN UNNEST(@Cluster))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Nodepool) = 0, TRUE, t.Nodepool IN UNNEST(@Nodepool))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Node) = 0, TRUE, t.Node IN UNNEST(@Node))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Type) = 0, TRUE, t.Type IN UNNEST(@Type))
    AND IF(ARRAY_LENGTH(@Status) = 0, TRUE, t.Status IN UNNEST(@Status))
    AND (ARRAY_LENGTH(@Is_CTM) = 0 OR CAST(t.Is_CTM AS STRING) IN UNNEST(@Is_CTM))
  )
ORDER BY
  t.MaintenanceStartTime DESC
LIMIT 10000
